appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/engine-book-api.md` to reflect that `search_best_move()` advances `engine_position`, so the documented frontend `set_position(fen)` → `search_best_move()` → next `set_position(fen)` flow now preserves repetition history and reaches threefold detection.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document both supported worker-loading strategies for the Emscripten bundle: ES-module `import()` with `-s EXPORT_ES6=1`, and classic-worker `importScripts()` with `createChessEngine` on the worker global scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The live implementation in `src/workers/chess-engine.worker.ts` uses `self.importScripts("/engine/engine.js")`, and the reviewed engine fixes intentionally chose that supported classic-worker path while `.factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md` still only describes the ES-module import flow.
